tags.description: It gave the name to the whole mountain.
tags.name: Буура-Тоо (Сулайман-Тоо)

tags.description: Shor-Too («Salt Mountain») - South slope of the second top – named for its white cap of efflorescence. North slope – Kochotluk-Too (Landslide Mountain).
tags.name: Шор-Тоо

tags.description: Eer-Too (Kelinchek). The top has the shape of a saddle, therefore the name is translated as «Saddle Mountain». Its North slope, having the bogen structure bears the name of «Kattama-Too» («Puff Mountain»).
tags.name: Ээр-Тоо (Келинчек)
